title: PokeLucky
body:
**Pokelucky Mod – Randomize! Hack! Chaos! Endless Fun!**  

Get ready for a brand-new Pixelmon experience with **Pokelucky Mod**, adding excitement, challenges, and surprises to your world!  

🔹 **Exciting Pokémon Randomization!**  
Open a **Pokelucky Block** and receive a variety of Pokémon and rare items from special chests! But be careful—you might also encounter **Team Rocket** or terrifying monsters! 😈🔥  

🎲 **Special Pokelucky Blocks!**  
- **Legendaries Lucky Block** – Unlock only **Legendary Pokémon**! 🌟  
- **Ultrabeasts Lucky Block** – A must-have for Ultra Beast fans seeking supernatural power! 🚀  

📱 **PokePhone – The Ultimate Trainer's Smartphone!**  
- **Store Pokémon anywhere** without needing a PC!  
- **Instant access to Ender Chest**—no more running around!  
- **Secure banking system** to safely store your money!  
- **Beware, hackers!** Use the Hack App to attempt stealing money or items from other players! 💀 (But be warned—failure is likely, and your PokePhone may break!)  
- **Remotely trade Pokémon** without using a trade machine!  
- **Heal Pokémon anytime, anywhere!** No need to find a Healing Station!  

⚙ **Smart Config System!**  
Customize your gameplay **directly within your world**—no messy config files needed!  

🚨 **Team Rocket is Back!**  
They mean business!  
- **Musashi (Jessie)** – Sneaks into your inventory to steal your items! 🎭  
- **Kojiro (James)** – Snatches your Pokémon when you least expect it! 🏴‍☠️  

💥 **Are you ready?** Dive into the chaos, randomize Pokémon, and conquer challenges with Pokelucky Mod! 🎮✨
